Lisette has an important announcement to share with one and all.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Lisette has an important announcement to share with one and all.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Lisette cheerily explains to you that the votes have been all but counted, and announces that the winner of the contest is none other than Rodrigault. She bids you accompany Rodrigault as an unbiased observer, such that you might render a sound decision on her behalf. Rodrigault then instructs you to wait just beyond his arranged meeting spot with your masked client.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
